Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Mistress of the Mists]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — The Mistress of the Mists is served by an order of killers known as the Am’haranai.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Lucan suggests appointing the Mistress of the Mists to lead the Guild and combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — A Mistress of the Mists is a desired presence for their chances.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Shera was named Mistress of the Mists by the Guild after binding her second Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Mistress of the Mists is a title or persona Shera uses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — The Mistress of the Mists inherited her title by killing her predecessor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — The Mistress of the Mists is the Consultant Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — There is a connection between the Mistress of the Mists and the Regents.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The Mistress of the Mists acknowledged Shera as Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — The string suggests someone will be a hood for the Mistress of the Mists.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
